title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 379.245 - Voting power of members
text:
379.245.  Voting power of members. — Every member of the company shall be entitled to one vote, or to a number of votes based upon the insurance in force, the number of policies held, or the amount of premiums paid, as may be provided in the bylaws.
(RSMo 1939 § 5958) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5847; 1919 § 6257
